data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for expense capture, specifically for meals and lodging for out-of-town work. However, the provided evidence does not include any information or endpoints that confirm the functionality of capturing such expenses. The linked use case mentions expense capture but does not provide concrete evidence or details on how meals and lodging expenses are handled, indicating a gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: Expense capture for meals and lodging for out-of-town work is not validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for expense capture
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the functionality of capturing meals and lodging expenses.
